title: rosa × dumetorum var. obtusifolia
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. obtusifolia, also known as the hybrid wild rose, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its leaves and stems. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rosa × dumetorum var. obtusifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
